programme.title: E13 - Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. Then, the chefs throw a party celebrating Chinese New Year. Since it is the Year of the Pig, the dishes must feature pork products and be delicious enough to impress Hong Kong’s super chef Jowett Yu along with Tom, Padma and Graham.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: E13 - Holy Macau!
programme.desc: The final five chefs travel to the Chinese territory of Macau for the remaining battles of the competition. Judge Graham Elliot, who has a restaurant in Macau, introduces the Chefs to the local market full of fascinating ingredients and challenges them to a Quickfire highlighting unique Macanese proteins. programme.title: E2 - The Flibber-Flabber Diet
programme.desc: After Truffles feels like she's put on a little weight, she demands that the whole company go on a diet. It's a battle of wills to see if she can lose weight before they rest of them lose their minds.

programme.title: E15 - Gazpacho Stands Up
programme.desc: Chowder gives Gazpacho a hand in preparing for his big comedy debut. But Chowder's poor penmanship threatens to turn the situation from funny to failure.

programme.title: E17 - The Puckerberry Overlords
programme.desc: When a sour berry sends Chowder on a strange journey into his own mouth, he finds himself on a mission to save his taste buds from some tart invaders.

programme.title: E19 - Sniffleball
programme.desc: Feeling Chowder's been spending too long in the kitchen, Mung forces him to play with the other kids. Beset by kisses and taunts, he tries to escape.

programme.title: Scoob!
programme.desc: Scooby and the gang face their biggest, most challenging mystery ever, a plot to unleash the ghost dog Cerberus upon the world.

programme.title: E1 - It's Like They Never Left!
programme.desc: Fifteen of the competition’s fiercest challengers return to face-off in the toughest season yet! A mise-en-place challenge set at the historic Griffith Observatory in Los Angeles kicks off the intense battle, where the Chefs immediately size each other up to see how everyone has progressed since last competing. Then, the first elimination challenge takes the Chefs to the beach to cook a seafood meal – however, their only heat source will be fire. No electricity, no special appliances. Back to basics. It’s going to be a true slug-match to see who has the skills and who has the drive to take the one thing that has eluded them all… the title of Top Chef! Padma Lakshmi, Tom Colicchio, and Gail Simmons return as judges and joining them as the first guest judge of the season is legendary Chef, Jeremiah Tower. Marcus Samuelsson, Nancy Silverton, Michael Cimarusti, Josiah Citrin, Suzanne Goin, Caroline Styne share the table for the high-powered, high-stress beach-side meal.

programme.title: E1 - Home Part 1
programme.desc: Li'l D is crushed when his idol Sunny Bridges goes missing.

programme.title: E4 - Hawaii
programme.desc: Get ready to understand the science behind Hawaii's stunning beaches. Why does sand appear white, yellow, black, green and red? How do active volcanoes change the coastline? Are other forces at play in shaping these incredible beaches?

programme.title: E5 - Australia
programme.desc: It’s a UNESCO World Heritage Site, the largest sand island on earth, and home to wild dingoes, six-foot sand-worms, and eucalyptus woodlands. Find out how everything lives happily together in a complex ecosystem built entirely upon sand.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: E1 - Spring
programme.desc: Discover the most fantastic city of them all lying beneath the waves, where romance and migratory commuters flood the coral reef’s main highways. Follow a green sea turtle looking for love and sit in with a cassowary dad tending his newborn chicks.

programme.title: E1 - Koala Country
programme.desc: Despite being one of Australia’s best-known marsupials, koalas live only in the east and southeast parts of the continent. Learn how their lives and behaviors vary in these different regions.

programme.title: E4 - Indonesia - the Secret Life of Manta Rays
programme.desc: The remote islands of Raja Ampat in the Indonesian archipelago are home to a diversity of marine life, including the secretive giants of the ocean - manta rays. A team of researchers from Conservation International heads out on an expedition to learn more about the biology, population size and migration patterns of these astonishing animals to protect them from overfishing outside of marine-protected areas.

programme.title: E2 - Lake Manyara National Park
programme.desc: In north Tanzania, towering mountains line a dramatic valley. Enriched by ancient volcanoes, its slopes provide a variety of habitats for life to thrive and its great centerpiece holds water through even the driest of times.

programme.title: E2 - Connections
programme.desc: Follow scientists and Traditional Owners as they map out ecological links, migratory pathways, and interspecies bonds that conserve Ningaloo’s biodiversity. Frolic with whales, float among seaweed islands, and see archaeologists nix a settler myth.

programme.title: E738 - Once Upon A Time

programme.title: E106 - Pretend Friend / Croc Outta Water
programme.desc: When Winston won't play with Lydia, Daisy and Mr. Crocodile create an imaginary friend for her. // Mr. Crocodile helps Daisy fish-sit for Martin, but worries he won't be able to stop himself from eating it.

programme.title: E404 - Ninja Blaze
programme.desc: Ninja Master Blackbelt is training Blaze and AJ to be powerful ninjas when Crusher and Pickle accidentally launch themselves onto an icy mountain! Now Blaze and AJ must use their new ninjas skills to rescue them.

programme.title: E324 - Pups Save A Giant Plant / Pups Get Stuck
programme.desc: Buddy - Mayor Goodway's gesture of goodwill gift grows wildly out of control when it's planted in the wrong place. Time for a transplant! // Metal mayhem ensues when Marshall's Fire Truck becomes mysteriously magnetized.

programme.title: E203 - Beach Scanner / Tidy / Pets
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: E141 - Chloe's Puppet Show
programme.desc: Peppa and George visit their cousin Chloe's house, where they put on a puppet show about a pig who snores a lot. Daddy Pig and Uncle Pig miss the show as they are too busy snoring.

programme.desc: After Speed Meister sabotages Builder Covegiving Day, it's up to the pups to save the holiday for everyone in Builder Cove. // Mix dreams about giving the moon a Mix makeover. Rubble and the pups make her dream a reality with a new boardwalk ride!

programme.title: E5
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 本劇講述二戰期間1942-1945年澳門「孤島」時期的抗戰風雲故事。 1941年12月香港淪陷後，澳葡政府名為“中立”，實則任由日軍澤榮作特務機關橫行霸道。愛國華人何賢、馬萬祺以及中共地下黨柯麟等人以強烈的愛國心與責任感團結同胞，凝聚澳門華人社團力量奮力反抗。

programme.title: E4
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: It's a perfect picnic with smoked trout dip, delicious skirt steak and romesco sauce, marinated vegetables and tomatoes with homemade onion sugar inspired by her grandma.

programme.title: E6 - Functional For The Fam
programme.desc: Meg and Joe help an overwhelmed couple take on their major home renovation. Then, the use a couple's inherited furniture to upgrade their office and bedroom.

programme.title: Operation Ouch! Does Space
programme.desc: Blast off! Dr. Chris boards a weightless flight, and Dr. Xand meets an astronaut to explore what happens to the human body in space. How do you sneeze, poo, and wee in zero gravity?

programme.title: Can I Have Superhero Vision?
programme.desc: X-Rays are a type of electromagnetic radiation. They were discovered in 1895 by Wilhelm Roentgen and helped medicine make a great leap forward. When we look at an X-Ray image we can see shadows of the objects the x-ray passes through, like superheroes.

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Magnificent Beast
programme.desc: Xavier battles to keep up with the baby barn owl's voracious appetite. Laura answers a cry for help about a dog called Bear that looks like a horse and plays like a tiger.

programme.title: The Mysterious Multiplying Erics
programme.desc: Have you ever noticed that as you reduce the angle between two mirrors, you will see an ever-increasing number of objects? If the mirrors are parallel to each other, can we see infinity? Eric travels to another dimension to find out.

programme.title: Vomit
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors look at vomit and show you how to make a sick vomit factory.

programme.title: Eight Heads Tall
programme.desc: In this episode we learn about non-standard measurement units that are often based on the concept of anthropometry: the built-in ratios for body measurements first proposed by Leonardo DaVinci. Can we measure people by merely knowing the size of their heads?

programme.title: Magic 9's
programme.desc: In this episode, mathemagician Eric reveals a cool math trick that illustrates the special properties of the number 9. Follow a given sequence ... multiply by three, add three, multiply by three, and then add two digits. What just happened?! It's not magic ... it's math!

programme.title: Problem Solvers
programme.desc: The Junior Vets need to find out why Tino, the horse, can't walk properly. They help remove a large lump from the throat of Zoe, the Schnauzer dog. And Pollux, the alpaca, is going bald - can the Junior Vets get to the bottom of the problem?

programme.title: And the Winner Is
programme.desc: The Junior Vets have spent four weeks at Vet School, and it's time to go home. Now they all have a chance to do one last check-up on their grateful patients and say goodbye. But which one of the kids has impressed Paul enough to take the title of Head Vet?

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: West Coast - Heading For Bird Island
programme.desc: Trying to find a shortcut to Bird Island, the youngsters end up stuck in a desolate dune field. Night falls and they encounter creatures that both scare and enthral them. They find a path to the coast and must cross a mighty river with the help of local fishermen.

programme.title: Lambert's Bay Bird Island - Where The Birds Are In Charge
programme.desc: The team travels a barren coastline to find Bird Island. They discover how the sandy beach is used by some highly adapted creatures and learn about the most dangerous animal on the planet. They explore the rocky shore and get to taste some very unusual seafood.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Ester
programme.desc: As head of the aquarium, Ester sets a pace that's hard to keep up with - especially on her Segway! And when a normal day includes alligators, zebra sharks, jellyfish and shark pods, you may need a Segway to keep up with this Spanish dynamo too!

programme.title: Darwin's Big Air!
programme.desc: Darwin wants to get big air on his BMX bike, so Heni and Newts help him practice!

programme.title: The Golden Girl (Kelly Holmes) and The Spaceman (Tim Peake)
programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: Mystery of the Reluctant Racer
programme.desc: Addison and Alex's record-setting soap box derby car seems like a shoe-in to win the annual race – until something or someone makes it mysteriously slow down to a crawl. Has it been sabotaged? Addison only has an hour till race time to solve the mystery!

programme.title: Courtly Love
programme.desc: Dove is going through a rocky time with her horrible husband, Lord Roach. She consequently falls for Sir Howler. Despite being humble and loyal, Howler isn't always a paragon of finesse when it comes to winning the lady's heart or dealing with the jealous spouse!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Ghostly Go Kart
programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.title: Day of the Gossip
programme.desc: While looking after Gav's cat and Sarah's guinea pig, Ricky gets bitten, and suddenly he can hear the pets talking! Not only that, they're gossiping about him.

programme.title: Cat Toy
programme.desc: OEistein makes a cardboard cat toy.

programme.title: Horn of Africa
programme.desc: A group of young adventurers continue their journey through Mountain Zebra National Park in South Africa. Game rangers teach them about Black Rhinos and White Rhinos and the importance of protecting them.

programme.title: Grounded
programme.desc: Naomi is confined to her room without communication devices, and relies on Carol to run messages back and forth to Claybook so she can keep up with what's going on in her complex social life. But chaos hits when the boy she likes chooses that exact day to get in touch.

programme.title: Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The kids see themselves in a new light and discover the errors of their ways when Yoko creates magical doppelgangers of them!

programme.title: Can I Have Superhero Vision?
programme.desc: X-Rays are a type of electromagnetic radiation. They were discovered in 1895 by Wilhelm Roentgen and helped medicine make a great leap forward. When we look at an X-Ray image we can see shadows of the objects the x-ray passes through, like superheroes.

programme.title: Spots
programme.desc: Dr. Chris and Dr. Xand are back in their kitchen lab! In today's episode, the doctors examine spots and cook up gunky edible spot cakes to squeeze and eat!

programme.title: How Tall is a Tree?
programme.desc: How can we figure out the height of tall objects such as a tree or a basketball net without using a ladder? In this episode we learn how indirect measurements, proportions, and estimation can be used to compute linear measures with surprising accuracy.

programme.title: Math is Everywhere
programme.desc: This episode explores mathematical patterns in nature, such as the tessellating hexagonal units of a honeycomb, the bilateral symmetry of a leaf, and the radial symmetry of a snowflake and spider web. Math really is everywhere!

programme.title: The Mystery of the Ghostly Go Kart
programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Party Popper
programme.desc: When helium balloons for Tess's fashion show start inexplicably popping, she is upset and asks Addison to help her figure out the cause and stop the rest of the balloons from popping before her show is RUINED!!

programme.desc: In this episode of Bear Grylls' Becoming Xtraordinary, Kelly Holmes reflects on how she became a double Olympic gold medallist and Tim Peake shares his journey from test pilot to the UK's first European Space Agency astronaut to stay on the International Space Station.

programme.title: USA - The War Against Women's Rights
programme.desc: This film shows the dramatic state of women's rights in the USA, today. Radical abortion bans and the unequal treatment of women and men by the justice system are leading to massive restrictions on fundamental rights.

programme.title: Of Caravan And The Dogs - Russia's Journalists And Their Fight For Press Fr
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Russian independent media and NGOs during the war in Ukraine. As the Putin government further escalates its suppression of free voices, newspaper Novaya Gazeta, radio station Echo of Moscow and Rain TV try to find ways to continue their work.

programme.title: My Body, My Heart
programme.desc: The heart is the most unusual muscle in our body. It works tirelessly, begins beating in the womb and can even continue functioning when the brain fails. Yet, when we're young, we barely pay any attention to it.

programme.title: Delivered! - The Courier Driver Business
programme.desc: In many German cities, bicycle couriers deliver burgers, pizza, and other food to people's homes. Thousands of these riders come from India, lured by the promise of studying in Germany, and have incurred heavy debts.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Les observateurs
programme.desc: Une émission réalisée à partir de contenus amateurs : photos ou vidéos, tout vient des observateurs du monde entier. Les contenus sont vérifiés par la rédaction de la chaîne.

programme.title: Sports
programme.desc: Un suivi de toutes les news sportives et les résultats avec ce magazine animé par des spécialistes du football, du basketball, du tennis et du cyclisme.

programme.title: Ici l'Europe : on vous écoute
programme.desc: Une émission d'interviews et de débats qui donne la parole aux citoyens européens. Elle propose une série de rencontres avec des personnalités politiques de premier plan.

programme.title: Autour du monde : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Les infos qui font la une tout autour du monde : reportages, analyses, et correspondants aux quatre coins du globe pour un point complet de l'actualité.

programme.title: E23 - The Gambler
programme.desc: ALF develops a bad gambling habit but sees it as an opportunity to help the Tanners pay for their house. He runs up a huge debt with Nick the Fish, however, and when Nick comes to collect, ALF panics.

programme.title: E13 - Masked
programme.desc: Capt. Jackson and his estranged daughter are reunited by her partner, Bebbie Shields under unfortunate circumstances.

programme.title: E11 - The Connection
programme.desc: A high school student's bad drug trip leads Hooker and Romano to a thriving angel dust lab.

programme.title: E5 - Part 5
programme.desc: The year is 1776 and the adult Kunta has lost none of his rebellious will. His final escape attempt costs him his right foot, and the crippled slave is nursed back to health by a slave woman called Bell.

programme.title: E13 - Masked
programme.desc: Capt. Jackson and his estranged daughter are reunited by her partner, Bebbie Shields under unfortunate circumstances.

programme.title: E4 - Part 4
programme.desc: The series depicts the stories of Pompeii's citizens with the threat of Mount Vesuvius bringing chaos and destruction. Arbaces's machinations and the persecution of Christians add to the growing tension.

programme.desc: When Susan Woods, 30, is found beaten and drowned in her tub in America's Cowboy Capitol, suspicion falls on her estranged husband.

programme.title: E9 - Kids Who Kill - Aaron Campbell
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Aaron Campbell didn't admit his crimes until after his conviction. He abducted six-year-old neighbour Alesha MacPhailand, carried her to a nearby wood, and raped and murdered her.

programme.title: E155
programme.desc: A man accused of indecency with a child's doll faces his accuser in court; an arsonist who killed nine people hears it from the judge; a multi-murder suspect misbehaves in the courtroom; and more.

programme.title: E111 - The Invitation
programme.desc: In Tulsa, a party becomes the scene of a murder. For investigators and prosecutors, the case is riding on two accomplices betraying their friends, despite the risks.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E17 - Good Hands
programme.desc: After a tragedy, Joan treats an old friend, pushing Amy to face her illness. Richard and TJ clash over a reckless tech bro.

programme.title: E2 - True Blue
programme.desc: Concerned about Blue, Doc breaks into her apartment, where DeShawn and Evie make a shocking discovery about one of their own.

programme.title: E17

programme.title: E1 - The Promise

programme.title: E8 - Hindsight
programme.desc: A case comes to haunt Tess when a righteous lawyer challenges her testimony about a home invasion gone wrong, threatening to overturn the conviction and Tess's future with the force – all on the basis of her vision loss. When Bennett takes Tess off the case to contain a potential scandal, Tess finds an unexpected ally in Owen, but she and Sunny are left wondering about their future, and worse: did Tess put an innocent man in jail? Tess leans on Matt and Mia, while Sunny grows hilariously defensive with her new therapist.

programme.desc: In BOSTON BLUE, a universe expansion of the long-running top drama BLUE BLOODS, Wahlberg will reprise his role as NYPD officer Danny Reagan as he takes a position with Boston PD. Once in Boston, he is paired with detective Lena Peters, the eldest daughter of a prominent law enforcement family.

programme.title: E17 - Dead Ringer
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. Nearing the end of his training, Nolan now faces his biggest challenge as a police officer when he must come to terms with the choices he has made in pursuit of the truth.

programme.title: E17 - Good Hands
programme.desc: After a tragedy, Joan treats an old friend, pushing Amy to face her illness. Richard and TJ clash over a reckless tech bro.

programme.title: E8 - Hindsight
programme.desc: A case comes to haunt Tess when a righteous lawyer challenges her testimony about a home invasion gone wrong, threatening to overturn the conviction and Tess's future with the force – all on the basis of her vision loss. When Bennett takes Tess off the case to contain a potential scandal, Tess finds an unexpected ally in Owen, but she and Sunny are left wondering about their future, and worse: did Tess put an innocent man in jail? Tess leans on Matt and Mia, while Sunny grows hilariously defensive with her new therapist.

programme.title: E23 - Hui Gumm Yaadein
programme.desc: Dr. Dev Mehta, a top surgeon who can't remember his own skills & past 8 years of life. now, forced to restart as an intern and have to re-learn medicine and face the family he no longer knows

programme.title: E221 - Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.title: Stars in Focus: Daniel Wu: House of Fury
programme.desc: A mysterious person arrived in his wheelchair in Yue's Clinic and asked for a person called Tai Chi Lung. Later on, Yue was found disappeared, leaving behind his clinic a mess...

programme.title: Blue Giant
programme.desc: Miyamoto Dai, a student with a passion for basketball, has an overnight life-changing experience after going to a jazz show for the first time. As if hypnotised by this music he knows nothing about, the young man decides to devote himself heart and soul to the saxophone and jazz becomes his new passion. Will he succeed in becoming a great musician?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: Cesium Fallout (Extended version)
programme.desc: After a fire accident triggers a radiation leakage, the entire city suddenly finds its survival hanging by a thread. In order to tackle the impending catastrophe, expert Simon Fan joins the emergency crisis response team led by Acting Chief Executive Cecilia to tackle this catastrophic disaster. With the lives of 7 million people on the line, the fire brigade is tasked with stopping the spread at all costs by entering the radiation zone. Facing this unprecedented calamity, will Hong Kong wake up to an overnight annihilation?

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E277 -Cold War
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: E5 - Don’t Look Down
programme.desc: The contestants are flown by helicopter to their next journey amidst a torrential downpour where they must cross a rope suspended one hundred feet above a deep gorge. The extreme height, and harsh camping conditions, test the teams.

programme.title: E5 - Highlights 5
programme.desc: In the penultimate stretch of their journey, the four remaining celebrities must find and eat the fruits of the forest, carefully separating nutritious treats from any potentially deadly dinners. After that, they endure another stormy night and face their most extreme challenge yet - crossing a 200ft ravine one by one on a rope. Bear also tests their ability to start a fire using only bamboo poles, knives and flints, before deciding which three he will take through to the Bear Grylls: Mission Survive final.

programme.title: E6 - Highlights 6
programme.desc: The final three contestants Kelly Holmes, Mike Tindall and Vogue Williams fight it out to be crowned Bear's Mission Survivor. The first task sees the group split for the first time, as the contenders abseil down a 300ft waterfall one by one. They then have to build a camp without their usual supplies, before tucking into the evening's dinner - rats, which must be gutted and cooked. The next morning, the team tackles a dense mangrove swamp, following the sound of a distress signal in an attempt to reach assistant Scott, and with the end in sight, Bear has one final challenge in store.

programme.title: E1 - Canine Cage Match
programme.desc: Billy throws down in a no-holds-barred cage match with one of the North's most feared predators, then teams up with trapper Ben for a dawn-to-dusk eviction of raccoons from clients' homes.

programme.title: E9 - Heavy Lifting
programme.desc: Moving a massive jade slab tests the mine’s old equipment and Josh’s patience.

programme.title: E10 - Panic Mode
programme.desc: Hauling a 20-tonne boulder on the treacherous road out of the mine proves too much for their old truck 6-Pack.

programme.title: E1 - Delhi
programme.desc: New Delhi is home to breathtaking architecture, great food and the world's highest rate of traffic accidents!

programme.desc: Yvan Hallouin explores Parisian places and projects that highlight inclusion. How do these initiatives promote equal opportunity and show that diversity is truly a strength?

programme.title: E1 - Les Retros Du Plateau
programme.desc: In the grounds of Harcourt Castle, Laurent meets Les Retros du plateau, one of the largest car clubs in Normandy. Jimmy Quetel, official BMW driver, presents Michel with a rare model from the 1960s: the BMW 700S.

programme.title: E5 - Halloween At The Castle
programme.desc: The Chateau d'Helecine gets into the Halloween spirit with multimedia shows, from the park to the orangery, including the main courtyard and the dome. Also featured: a friendly meeting between Salvatore Adamo and Michel Drucker; watchmaker Gilles Clavareau; and Thierry Verhoeven's kumquat gin.

programme.title: E3 - Mouscron
programme.desc: Wallonie picarde stop! Mouscron borders both France and the linguistic frontier: Aalbeke and Rekkem separate it from the Flemish region. Visits to the Marcel Marlier Centre, the creator of ''Martine'', the Castle of the Counts, the nature reserve, and the Blue Fountain.

programme.title: E35 - Grillemont - Le Clos Luce
programme.desc: The Grillemont castle, near Tours, is a former fortress transformed into an 18th-century residence. The Clos Luce, also near Tours, is famous for having been the home of the renowned Leonardo da Vinci.

programme.title: E11 - Gers, From Village To Village
programme.desc: A picture postcard of the Gascony countryside, the Gers, with its vineyards and verdant landscapes, is a ''big garden'', rich in agriculture and livestock. The birthplace of d'Artagnan and Armagnac, Gascon traditions and cuisine live on in this land of history and culture.

programme.title: E4 - So Ugly
programme.desc: Christian welcomes actor Marc-Andre Grondin, writer Chrystine Brouillet, and chef Jean-Michel Leblond to cook foods considered 'unappetizing.' From offal to snails, they explore unusual flavors.

programme.title: E11 - Ursula Caruel/Tree Embolism/Langres Landscape
programme.desc: Contents: Ursula Caruel, an artist inspired by the herbarium, for a local and nomadic art form; tree embolism; the landscapes of the Langres plateau; Don't panic with Marie-Laure.

programme.title: E3 - The Philadelphia Museum Of Art, Classical Painting
programme.desc: The Philadelphia Museum of Art is home to a major collection of American and European works, from the Italian Renaissance to the world of contemporary art. Amongst the French painters, those of the classical period: Vigee Le Brun, Corot, Delacroix, Millet, Couture, Courbet, Puvis de Chavannes...

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won't find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today's world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation. The Agenda: No nonsense talk; Challenging perceptions.

programme.title: The Ube Revolution: Philippines' Purple Yam Goes Global[Live]
programme.desc: is a 2026 documentary by journalist Johnson Manabat that features the humble purple yam or ube, and how it has taken over the global market. Dubbed “the purple reign”, ube has become a major culinary trend, driven by its vibrant and Instagram-worthy hue. Manabat heads to the Philippines' summer capital, Baguio City, where local businesses continue to thrive because of ube. The documentary also looks into the Philippines' next export standout and how local farmers in Baguio are dealing with the wave of demand for the crops.

programme.title: E4 - 黃曉明被「貼心小棉襖」感動落淚
programme.desc: 「極挑團」原班人馬將與新成員一起解鎖更多挑戰，他們將與廣大觀眾一起跨越大江南北，體驗國民生活百態，用真心探訪這片古老土地上正在發生的溫情故事，以更豐富的視角觸摸這卷山河下每一位個體的對美好生活的深切期望。

programme.title: E15 - 同頻比心動更重要

programme.title: E2 - A Big Day of Teamwork & Fixes!
programme.desc: It's a big day of teamwork & fixes at Gecko's Garage! When the Mechanicals accidentally injure Gecko's foot, they must learn the value of teamwork to finish repairing Bobby the Bus by themselves. Then, when Green Mechanical gets stressed, Gecko teaches her mindfulness tips to calm down. The teamwork continues as Gecko helps his rival, Mr. Weasel, fix an engine with a clean electric one, & the whole crew works together to repair Trevor the Tractor's giant gears!

programme.title: E2 - JJ Sings & Dances to Classic Rhymes!
programme.desc: It's a dance party featuring all your favorite classic rhymes! Join JJ, Bella & Cece as they dance to 'Hey Diddle Diddle' while the cow jumps over the moon. The fun continues as they help their friend Humpty Dumpty get home after a great fall with the help of some sea creature friends! Then, get ready to rock out with a band of monkeys in a brand-new version of 'Rockabye Baby.' From 'Five Little Speckled Frogs' to 'Looby Loo,' it's a dance party full of classic fun!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: E2 - A Calming Night with Twinkle!
programme.desc: Have a calming & magical night with Twinkle the star! When Bao Bao struggles to sleep, Twinkle arrives & transforms into a hot air balloon to lift her cot into the night sky so she can see the moon. Then, she helps Max, Muffin & Bao Bao get ready for bed by transforming into a cuddly teddy bear to give them all warm goodnight hugs. From creating a magical rainbow over the bath to turning into a kite for a gentle ride, Twinkle always makes bedtime magical.

programme.title: E8 - Relaxing Songs
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E5 - JJ's Big 'On The Move' Dance Party!
programme.desc: Get ready for a dance party that's always on the move! Join JJ, Cody & Nina as they groove to 'Wheels on the Bus' while a real bus travels in the background. Then, it's time to line up & pretend to be a train, chugging along to the 'Train Song'! The adventure continues as the kids put on their fire hats & sing about being brave firefighters with a big red firetruck. From the 'Animal Song' to seeing vehicles on the street, it's a high-energy dance party!

programme.title: E5 - An Adventure, Pedals, Rescue & Stars!
programme.desc: Join the Minibods for an adventure with pedals, rescues & stars! Lulu goes camping but realizes she's left her favorite Binky Bunny behind & has to learn how to cope. Then, Newt goes on an adventure to find a real-life Flutterbug, but she has to be brave when her bike's stabilizers come off! The adventures continue as Jeff overcomes his fear of mud to rescue his feather duster & Bubbles builds a rocket to try & reach a big purple star in the sky!

programme.title: E4 - Using Your Brains to Save the Day!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he uses his brains to save the day! When he overloads the carwash with bubble mix, he gets trapped in a giant bubble & floats away! He has to use all his smarts to find a way back down. Then, when Amber the Ambulance crashes & can't move, there's a big emergency! Buster has to muster up his courage & become a 'Hero Ambulance Bus' to save his best friend Scout from a broken bridge.

programme.title: E1 - Stopping Weasel's Wacky Schemes!
programme.desc: Gecko is busy stopping Mr. Weasel's wacky schemes! First, Gecko & Weasel face off in a football match, but Weasel starts cheating! Gecko must fix his damaged teammates & teach Weasel a lesson. Then, Bobby the Bus's battery goes missing, & all clues point to Weasel! The schemes continue as Weasel tries to show off at a 'fix up fair' but needs rescuing, & he steals cakes from a bake sale but ends up crashing!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Favorite Games & Vehicles!
programme.desc: It's time to play JJ's favorite games! Join Ms. Appleberry & the Melon Patch kids as they play 'follow the leader' & have a contest to see who can make the silliest funny face. Then, JJ & his animal friends have a party where they play freeze dance! The fun continues with vehicles, as Grandpa makes a cool choo-choo train out of cardboard boxes & the kids play with different construction vehicles in a giant sandpit.

programme.title: Trailblazing
programme.desc: The feature program 'Trailblazing' on Shenzhen TV fully illustrates Shenzhen's trailblazing exploration and demonstration role as a pilot demonstration zone for socialism with Chinese characteristics. Through the micro recording approach and small entry points in character stories, the program showcases stories of trailblazing exploration and pioneering efforts in Shenzhen, reflecting the major theme of China's high-quality development.

programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 以日本尚未制度化的臥底誘捕調查為主題，森川葵在劇中飾演的是警視廳新設立小隊「STINGERS（臥底搜查檢證室）」的隊長——二階堂民子。她是警察廳的菁英份子，曾赴美接受 FBI 的正統「Sting Operation（臥底行動）」訓練，身為頂尖精英警視歸國。擅長偽裝、即興演技、心理操控與陷阱設計，是臥底搜查的專家。說話簡潔、指示神秘，經常以出人意表的行動讓部下摸不著頭緒，卻又總能在不知不覺間讓一切線索串連起來。這位充滿謎團的領導者，將帶領 STINGERS 成功解決各種案件。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 日本最大的財閥集團「加賀美集團」的CEO，也是一位天才發明家，加賀美零隱藏自己的身份，潛入私立絵都學園，成為了一名高中教師。該校的3年0班是一個集合了被認為「無幹勁、無才能、無前途」的學生，被學校其他部分貶低為「零組」。加賀美零將在這樣的環境中，與這些學生共同成長，挑戰教育常規。

programme.title: My Dad Is A Jerk
programme.desc: Lee Lap Cheong is an immature, irresponsible and gutless guy who does not know how to say 'Sorry' and 'Thank you', a good-for-nothing who has completely given away his pride. When Cheong was still young, he married Yip Ting, who then bore him a son. As Ting grew older, she changed her outlook on life and realized that Cheong's love was not as important as financial security. She divorced Cheong and immigrated to Canada with their son Jason to start a new life...

programme.title: Bless This House
programme.desc: It is a dream come true for engineer Bill Cheung when a quiet villa in the countryside is assigned to him as staff quarters. As soon as he moves into this extravagant estate with his wife and 2 daughters, strange things begin to happen. When his daughter Jane discovers the previous owners were burned to death many years ago, Bill's family is already on their way to a similar tragic demise...

programme.title: E752
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: E36
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: E323
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.
